step_texts: Must perform identity bootstrap per rules before task work: tree / then read AGENTS.md then context.
Tree bootstrap completed. Next required bootstrap step is reading root rulebook file.
Loaded root AGENTS.MD. Bootstrap still requires context call. After that, obey root rule: inspect 99_system with tree before task work, then find relevant workflow docs if any.
Identity bootstrap complete (tree/read/context done), but root rulebook additionally requires inspecting 99_system before task work.
Inspected 99_system tree as required. Need nested AGENTS in entered folder before proceeding.
System policy read. Now task-specific lookup requires entity resolution, so enter entities lane and read nested rulebooks first.
Entered entities lane; must read nested cast rulebook before using entity files.
Need canonical entity data and aliases for Vesela Jana before scanning messages.
Resolved target entity as Jana Vesela with alias jana; need channel transcript rules and then exhaustive channel reads.
Need nested channels rulebook before reading channel files.
Ready for exhaustive transcript review across all channel logs.
First channel read; no Jana-authored message there despite participant list includes entity.jana. Must continue exhaustive reads.
No Jana in grimdark. Continue exhaustive channel reads.
Still no Jana-authored messages. Continue channel-by-channel.
No Jana here either. Continue exhaustive reading.
Household calendar has none. Need remaining channels.
No Jana in household_signal. Must finish exhaustive scan of remaining channel files before deciding.
Still none. Continue remaining channels.
Only one channel left; after reading it do exhaustive verification likely none found. Then maybe targeted search to confirm alias forms.

Pre-submit verification: Task asks for last recorded message from Vesela Jana. I resolved canonical entity via 10_entities/cast/jana.md (Jana Vesela, alias jana) and read every channel transcript file under 60_outbox/channels as instructed. None contain a message authored by Jana/Vesela/entity.jana; several channels have no messages at all. Since absence of recorded message means data missing, correct outcome is OUTCOME_NONE_CLARIFICATION (not OUTCOME_OK).
Must follow mandatory identity bootstrap before task work: tree('/'), read('AGENTS.md'), context(). Starting with tree.
Completed tree bootstrap step. Next required bootstrap step is reading AGENTS.md at workspace root; actual filename appears as AGENTS.MD from tree output.
Read root AGENTS.MD; must still call context to complete mandatory identity bootstrap. After that, need inspect 99_system per AGENTS before task work.
Identity bootstrap complete (tree/read/context). Per AGENTS.MD, must inspect 99_system with tree before task work.
Inspected 99_system tree as required. Need read 99_system/AGENTS.MD for local rules before task work in other folders.
System policy read. Next entering entities lane, so must read nested AGENTS files there before lookup.
Need cast-specific rules before reading entity files.
Entity lane rules loaded. Now resolve 'lab server' to canonical entity record and alias before project search.
No direct 'lab server' text in cast. Need broader entity resolution via likely descriptors.
Found two potential system entities via relationship markers: foundry (lab_server) and juniper (home_server). Need read both to disambiguate 'lab server'.
Foundry explicitly has relationship lab_server with alias foundry. Still must read juniper too because it was plausible candidate per rule.
Disambiguation complete: lab server maps to Foundry alias foundry (juniper is home_server). Before searching projects, read 40_projects/AGENTS.MD per nested rule.
Ready for entity->projects lookup using canonical alias foundry. Need exhaustive structured search in projects.
Found 5 project README matches for entity.foundry; must read every matching README to extract exact project names for output.
Extracted project name Hearthline from first matched README. Continue reading all remaining matched READMEs.
Got House Mesh. Need remaining 3 matched projects.
Got Northstar Ledger. Need last two read files before final response.
Need last matched README (black_library_evenings) then can report alphabetized project names only.

Pre-submit check: task asks which projects lab server is involved in, return exact project names sorted alphabetically, one per line. Resolved lab server to entity.foundry via 10_entities/cast/foundry.md (relationship lab_server) and disambiguated against juniper (home_server). Exhaustive structured search used pattern entity.foundry in 40_projects and returned 5 matches; read all 5 canonical project READMEs and extracted titles. Sorted alphabetically: Black Library Evenings, Hearthline, Helios Workflow Sprint, House Mesh, Northstar Ledger.
